commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: The terrible sentence awarded by St. Paul, bears equally strong against modern as against ancient innovators in religion.

commentaries.author: Jerome
commentaries.content: He indicates that he initially, fearing this very thing, denounced an anathema on those who would preach in this way. Now, after it has been preached, he decrees the anathema that he formerly predicted. .

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: Lest you should think that the words came from passion or were spoken hyperbolically or through a loss of selfcontrol, he says the same things over again.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
